summary: Implementation review accepts PR #229 head b053c3006752205b0548b2947b7f4e6bcb489be3 for Harbor #212 screenshot failure evidence semantics.
reviewed_validation_summary: 2026-07-08T13:41Z UTC carrier refresh passed locally: `jq empty .loom/specs/HARBOR-212/build-evidence.json .loom/bootstrap/init-result.json`, `git diff --check`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item HARBOR-212 --json`, `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item HARBOR-212 --json`, and `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item HARBOR-212 --json`. The underlying code validation remained current from 2026-07-08T13:15Z UTC: `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm test` (30 tests), `pnpm smoke:runtime` (fixture mode only), `git diff --check`, `loom build --target . --item HARBOR-212 --build-evidence .loom/specs/HARBOR-212/build-evidence.json --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, and suite validate/carrier/evidence checks passed locally. `tools/skills_surface.py check`, `tools/loom_check.py --profile source --source-surface contract-only`, `tools/check_release_surface.py`, `tools/version_surface_check.py`, and `tools/check_npm_package.py` were executed against the installed global Loom package because Harbor has no repo-local `tools/` directory; they failed on installed Loom source/release/parity markers unrelated to HARBOR-212 and are classified as external Loom tool surface issues outside this PR write scope. `pnpm smoke:runtime:local` was not run because it launches a real local browser and can visit production pages.
follow_ups: Provider exceptions thrown instead of returned as structured screenshot failure are outside this PR and should be handled by a separate Work Item if required.
This implementation approval does not close Harbor #209/#210/#211/#208/#218 and does not prove App/Core packaged E2E.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The behavior now denies screenshot refs/evidence when live screenshot capture returns a structured failure, so Harbor no longer misrepresents a failed screenshot as evidence.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The code change is limited to `captureLiveSnapshot`, regression coverage proves no screenshot evidence is minted on structured failure, and validation passed without real browser/profile/production-page actions.
